title: Analytics & Web Vitals
learning_outcomes: Describe structural characteristics of Analytics & Web Vitals.
Derive mathematical and programmatic bounds for Core Web Vitals report configurations (LCP, FID, CLS), monitoring hooks.

content_sections.title: Analytics & Web Vitals
content_sections.content:
### App Router Routing, Rendering & Caching
Next.js structures rendering patterns using server and client component boundaries.

#### RSC vs. Client Components
*   **React Server Components (RSC):** Render strictly on the server. Do not ship JavaScript code to the client. Can fetch database rows directly.
*   **Client Components (`'use client'`):** Render on the server during build and hydrate in the browser. Required for interactivity hooks.
*   *Serialization:* RSC communicates with Client Components using a serializable JSON-like payload representation, preventing passing function callbacks across boundaries.

#### Next.js 15 Caching layers
1.  **Request Deduplication:** Caches identical `GET` fetch requests within a single render tree.
2.  **Data Cache:** Persists fetched data across server requests. Invalidated using tags or paths.
3.  **Full Route Cache:** Stores compiled HTML and RSC payloads for static pages at build time.
4.  **Router Cache:** Client-side browser cache caching visited route segments during user sessions.

#### Rendering Models
*   **ISR:** Background regeneration of static pages using stale-while-revalidate caches.
*   **PPR:** Streams page layouts: serves the static shell instantly from cache while dynamic blocks run in parallel.

### Depth Analysis: Analytics & Web Vitals
In production configurations, we analyze how Core Web Vitals report configurations (LCP, FID, CLS), monitoring hooks affects performance parameters. We evaluate memory layouts and consensus thresholds.

callouts.title: Common Trap in Analytics & Web Vitals
callouts.content: A common mistake when analyzing Analytics & Web Vitals is ignoring latency bounds and boundary edge cases during concurrent executions.

callouts.title: Production Scaling for Analytics & Web Vitals
callouts.content: Production servers implement strict resource isolation and cache alignments to prevent performance regressions when running Analytics & Web Vitals loops.
